truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 identified 6 of the 20 true vulnerabilities. It correctly located format string injection, integer overflow in factorial, stack buffer overflow in input processing, race condition in counter, heap overflow in expression parser, and division by zero in routing. It missed 14 vulnerabilities including use-after-free, command injection via config, logic bomb, path traversal, hardcoded credentials, weak PRNG, thread-unsafe timestamp cache, insecure temp files, persistent auth state, unhandled exceptions, integer underflow, unbounded recursion, data race in cache, and TOCTOU. Severity and CWE classifications for some found items were slightly misaligned with ground truth.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string vulnerability in log_debug_message. It classified severity as High instead of Critical.
Run 2 correctly identified integer overflow in the fact function. It classified severity as Low instead of High.
Run 2 did not report the use-after-free in stage_deferred_history_flush where scratch is allocated, enqueued, and potentially freed during cleanup before async tasks finish.
Run 2 reported command injection in the admin console but missed the separate injection in config validation via validator_cmd + config_file.
Run 2 correctly identified the stack buffer overflow in evaluate_expression when expression length exceeds input_buffer_ size.
Run 2 correctly identified the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter::increment due to reading value_ outside the lock.
Run 2 missed the logic bomb/authentication bypass in AdminConsole::authenticate where EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE bypasses login_attempts_ > 5 check.
Run 2 missed path traversal in ConfigLoader::load_config where config_dir_ + filename is concatenated without sanitization before filesystem::exists.
Run 2 correctly identified the heap overflow in ExpressionParser::parse. It classified CWE as 120 instead of 122.
Run 2 missed hardcoded admin credentials (ADMIN_SECRET / SC_ENT_2025_AUTH) in config::security.
Run 2 missed weak PRNG for session tokens using std::mt19937 seeded by std::random_device but generating only 4-digit ranges.
Run 2 missed thread-unsafe timestamp cache in log_debug_message where static std::tm cached_time is modified by localtime without synchronization.
Run 2 missed insecure temporary file handling in append_override_audit_event using environment variables TEMP/TMPDIR without validation.
Run 2 missed persistent authentication state where authenticated_, login_attempts_, and session_token_ survive across sessions without reset.
Run 2 missed unhandled exception in handle_variable_command where std::stod(tokens[3]) can throw if tokens[3] is non-numeric.
Run 2 missed integer underflow in MemoryPool::allocate where previous_size - size - SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES can underflow if previous_size is small.
Run 2 missed unbounded recursion in ExpressionParser::parse_factor calling parse_expression recursively on PAREN_OPEN without depth limit checks.
Run 2 missed data race in ExpressionEvaluator::evaluate_cached where result_cache_ is accessed and modified without cache_mutex_ protection during thread_pool_->enqueue.
Run 2 missed TOCTOU in ConfigLoader::load_config between std::filesystem::exists and std::ifstream file open, exacerbated by sleep_for.
Run 2 correctly identified division by zero in calculate_route_score. It classified severity as Medium instead of Low.
